description_long: This object is a robust vehicle wheel featuring a thick, black rubber tire mounted on a metallic rim. The tire has a deep, blocky tread pattern designed for enhanced traction, likely suitable for off-road or utility vehicles. The rim is metallic silver with a utilitarian design, displaying a series of circular holes and a central hub with multiple lug nuts. The sidewalls of the tire are smooth, while the tread is rugged and pronounced. The wheel appears to be of medium-to-large size, typical for trucks or vans, and is constructed to withstand heavy loads. The overall appearance is functional and durable, with minimal decorative elements.
description: A sturdy vehicle wheel with a deep, blocky tread tire and a metallic rim featuring multiple lug nuts and circular holes. The design is utilitarian, emphasizing durability and traction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the metallic rim with circular holes and a central hub with visible lug nuts.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, blocky tread pattern of the tire and the overall width of the wheel.
description_view_2: Rear view of the wheel, similar to the front but with a less detailed rim center and fewer visible lug nuts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the rugged tread pattern and tire thickness.
attribute_spoke_pattern: Six solid spokes arranged radially, evenly spaced, with circular cutouts between them.
attribute_rim_design: The rim is metallic silver with a deep profile, featuring six large circular holes and a slightly raised central hub. The design is utilitarian with no decorative elements, prioritizing strength and function.
attribute_lug_nut_configuration: Six lug nuts arranged in a circular, evenly spaced pattern around the central hub.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: Symmetrical, blocky tread pattern with large rectangular blocks and deep grooves for enhanced traction.
